message:
fix: replace black void with loading skeleton during page navigation (#345)

The Suspense fallback in Layout.tsx was set to null, causing a completely
black content area for up to 4 seconds during initial page loads while
lazy chunks compiled/loaded. Replace with a card grid skeleton that
provides visual feedback.

Also fix ProtectedRoute to render children optimistically when a token
exists (rather than returning null during auth loading), and narrow
transition-all to transition-[margin] to prevent animating unrelated
CSS properties.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -194,13 +194,39 @@ export function Layout({ children }: LayoutProps) {
- + + {/* Header skeleton */} +
+
+
+
+
+
+ {/* Card grid skeleton */} +
+ {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6].map(i => ( +
+
+
+
+
+
+
+
+
+
+
+ ))} +
+
+ }> {children}
